zh.lifeSummary: 當Thiébaut II de Bar於1221年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Henri II de Bar32歲，母親Philippa de Dreux29歲。他於1245年與Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre結婚。他去世於1291年10月在法國洛萊姆斯享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thiébaut II de Bar于1221年出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，他的父亲Henri II de Bar32岁，母亲Philippa de Dreux29岁。他于1245年与Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre结婚。他去世于1291年10月在法国洛萊姆斯享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Thiébaut
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Thiébaut II de Bar was born in 1221, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Henri II de Bar, was 32 and his mother, Philippa de Dreux, was 29. He married Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre in 1245. He died in October 1291, in Meuse, Lorraine, France, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thiébaut II de Bar est né en 1221, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Henri II de Bar, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Philippa de Dreux, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre en 1245. Il est décédé en octobre 1291, à Meuse, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thiébaut II de Bar 1221 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri II de Bar 32 und seine Mutter Philippa de Dreux 29. Er hat 1245 Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre geheiratet. Er starb im Oktober 1291 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thiébaut II de Bar è nato il nel 1221 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Henri II de Bar, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Philippa de Dreux, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre nel 1245. Morì nel ottobre 1291, nel Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thiébaut II de Barが1221年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Henri II de Barは32歳，母Philippa de Dreuxは29歳であった。1245年にJeanne de Dampierre-Flandreと結婚した。彼は1291年10月にフランスロレィヌメウゼで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thiébaut II de Bar(이)가 1221년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri II de Bar(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa de Dreux(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1245년 Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1291년 10월 프랑스 로레이인 우스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thiébaut II de Bar nasceu em 1221, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Henri II de Bar, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Philippa de Dreux, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre em 1245. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1291, em Meuse, Lorraine, França, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thiébaut II de Bar родился в 1221 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Henri II de Bar было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa de Dreux, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre в 1245 г. Он умер октябрь 1291 г. в местности меус, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thiébaut II de Bar nació en 1221, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Henri II de Bar, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Philippa de Dreux, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre en 1245. Murió en octubre de 1291, en Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 70 años.
